Dane Easter Rose

◆
Author · 10 X Designer · Cultural Innovator
Global Citizen — California · Philippines · Thailand · Costa Rica
— Sculpture & Crystal Art —

I design things — landscapes, books, sculptures, frameworks for better relationships and better cultures. After 33 years running a landscape business in California, I retired at 50 to run a nonprofit focused on what actually makes human lives better.

Landscape Design
 
 
 
“Intelligence is measured by the efficiency with which energy — time, money and natural resources — is transformed into sustainable well-being.”
Original Paintings
“Preventing unnecessary childhood trauma is the highest form of intelligence on earth.”

Key Accomplishments

Invented a human user’s manual
Designed, built and landscaped my first custom home at age 23
Wrote five thousand poems and published a small collection of poems
Built a database of great media
Created a Ritual for Amazing Relationship Endings in my book The Art of Partnering
Started my business at 17 and ran it for 33 years
Retired at 50 to run my own nonprofit
Created one thousand YouTube videos including “The Art of 10 X Conversations”
Designed an Optimal Micro Culture
